query: Tokyo population 2024 official statistics city proper
answer: As of 2024, Tokyo's city proper population is approximately 37.1 million. This figure is based on official statistics and reflects a slight decline in population growth. For the most current and detailed data, consult official government or statistical resources.

results.title: Tokyo, Japan Metro Area Population (1950-2026) - Macrotrends
results.snippet: ## Tokyo, Japan Metro Area Population (1950-2026). ##### The current metro area population of Tokyo in 2026 is **36,954,000**, a **0.22% decline** from 2025. * The metro area population of Tokyo in 2025 was **37,036,000**, a **0.21% decline** from 2024. * The metro area population of Tokyo in 2024 was **37,115,000**, a **0.21% decline** from 2023. * The metro area population of Tokyo in 2023 was **37,194,000**, a **0.21% decline** from 2022. The full historical dataset is available for download here: [Tokyo, Japan Metro Population | Historical Data | 1950-2026](https://www.macrotrends.net/datasets/global-metrics/cities/21671/tokyo/population). ## Total Population.

results.title: Tokyo Loses Title Of World’s Most Populous City, According To UN
results.snippet: A new United Nations report has awarded the title of the world’s most populous city to Jakarta, the capital of Indonesia. Tokyo has slipped to third place in the World Urbanization Prospects 2025 report from the population division of the UN’s Depart of Economic and Social Affairs, with an estimated population of 33 million. The report’s dataset includes the latest estimates of urban and rural populations for 237 countries or areas from 1950 to 2025, with projections until 2050. Applying this new approach to gridded population and built-up area data allows the new report to, “measure cities, towns and rural areas consistently across countries and over time, while still retaining results based on national definitions for domestic policy use and statistical continuity.”. Projections indicate a continuing trend, with two-thirds of global population growth expected to take place in cities by 2050. ## The 10 most populous cities in the world.
